metadata.title: La Quebrada Viva — canonical AOI bbox (1,100 ha enclosing the 62-ha parcel)
metadata.license: CC0-1.0 (this AOI file). Datasets pulled against this AOI carry their own licenses (see DATA_INVENTORY.md §9).
metadata.notes: This bbox is the acquisition footprint used by every DEM (ALOS/COP30/SRTM/NASADEM), Sentinel-2 fetch, and GEDI granule search. It encloses the 62-ha parcel with ~5x safety margin so neighboring drainage + ridgeline context comes in too. The real 62-ha boundary is somewhere inside; precise polygon arrives with Anexo I post-escritura (2026-06-27).
metadata.created_by: AI Whisperers / Ivan Weiss Van Der Pol
